{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Marketing & Sales Strategist",
  "description": "Talentforge Solutions Limited (Nigeria) is an HR consulting firm in Lagos focused on recruitment, training, and outsourcing, aiming to link top talent with leading companies through integrity and innovation in HR services.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Marketing &amp; Sales Strategist

Job Location:&nbsp;Gbagada, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

About The Role


	We are seeking a driven Marketing &amp; Sales Strategist who functions like a Business Development Manager with a strong field presence.
	You&rsquo;ll be responsible for generating leads by taking our travel products directly to organizations, corporate offices, events, and other strategic locations to build awareness, pitch solutions, and close deals.
	This is a boots-on-the-ground role for someone who thrives on face-to-face engagement and can turn conversations into conversions.


Requirements


	Education: Minimum of OND / HND / BSc Degree in Marketing, Business Admin, or related fields
	Experience: 2+ years in marketing, sales, or business development. Travel/tourism industry experience is a strong advantage
	Skills: Excellent communication, negotiation, and presentation skills. Must be confident pitching to groups and C-suite executives
	Mindset: Self-starter with strong hunting instincts. Target-driven and resilient
	Location: Must reside in or around Gbagada, Lagos for ease of movement.


Salary
N200,000 - N250,000 monthly.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;resume@talentforgesolutions.com.ng&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Marketing & Sales Strategist Job at Talentforge Solutions Limited




        
    

        
        Talentforge Solutions Limited (Nigeria) is an HR consulting firm in Lagos focused on recruitment, training, and outsourcing, aiming to link top talent with leading companies through integrity and innovation in HR services.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Marketing & Sales Strategist

Job Location: Gbagada, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

About The Role
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a driven Marketing & Sales Strategist who functions like a Business Development Manager with a strong field presence.
	You’ll be responsible for generating leads by taking our travel products directly to organizations, corporate offices, events, and other strategic locations to build awareness, pitch solutions, and close deals.
	This is a boots-on-the-ground role for someone who thrives on face-to-face engagement and can turn conversations into conversions.


Requirements


	Education: Minimum of OND / HND / BSc Degree in Marketing, Business Admin, or related fields
	Experience: 2+ years in marketing, sales, or business development. Travel/tourism industry experience is a strong advantage
	Skills: Excellent communication, negotiation, and presentation skills. Must be confident pitching to groups and C-suite executives
	Mindset: Self-starter with strong hunting instincts. Target-driven and resilient
	Location: Must reside in or around Gbagada, Lagos for ease of movement.


Salary
N200,000 - N250,000 monthly.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Customer Service Representative",
  "description": "Lexshield Properties Limited is a Real Estate Development Company opening up new areas in cities across the country, to provide exclusive estates with unique designs that ensure comfort and security at very affordable rates. It is made up of professionals with diverse experience that create an innovative working environment for young talents to thrive. Our concern is to make housing and Real Estate products a reality for all average Nigerians

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Service Representative

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Summary


	A leading Real Estate Company located in Omole Phase 1, Ikeja, Lagos requires the services of a Customer Service Representative.&nbsp;


Responsibilities


	Serve as the primary point of contact for clients
	Handle inquiries, complaints, and service requests in a timely and professional manner
	Oversee daily estate operations and functionality
	Coordinate maintenance, repairs, and facility services
	Supervise routine inspections of properties and common areas
	Maintaining a positive, empathetic, and professional attitude toward customers at all times.
	Acknowledging and resolving customer complaints.
	Knowing our products inside and out in order to answer questions professionally
	Processing orders, forms, applications, and requests.
	Keeping records of customer interactions, transactions, comments, and complaints.
	Communicating and coordinating with colleagues as necessary.
	Providing feedback on the efficiency of the customer service process.
	Managing a team of junior customer service representatives.
	Ensure customer satisfaction and provide professional customer support.


Requirements &amp; Qualifications


	Minimum of HND / B.Sc Degree in Estate Management, Business Administration, or related fields
	2 - 4 years of experience in customer service, estate, or property management
	Strong interpersonal and communication skills
	Ability to handle complaints and resolve issues effectively
	Good organizational and multitasking abilities
	Basic knowledge of facility/estate management practices
	Proficiency in MS Office tools
	Proximity to Ikeja or its environs is an added advantage.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;hr.lexshieldpropertiesltd@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Customer Service Representative Job at Lexshield Properties Limited




        
    

        
        Lexshield Properties Limited is a Real Estate Development Company opening up new areas in cities across the country, to provide exclusive estates with unique designs that ensure comfort and security at very affordable rates. It is made up of professionals with diverse experience that create an innovative working environment for young talents to thrive. Our concern is to make housing and Real Estate products a reality for all average Nigerians

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Service Representative

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	A leading Real Estate Company located in Omole Phase 1, Ikeja, Lagos requires the services of a Customer Service Representative. 


Responsibilities


	Serve as the primary point of contact for clients
	Handle inquiries, complaints, and service requests in a timely and professional manner
	Oversee daily estate operations and functionality
	Coordinate maintenance, repairs, and facility services
	Supervise routine inspections of properties and common areas
	Maintaining a positive, empathetic, and professional attitude toward customers at all times.
	Acknowledging and resolving customer complaints.
	Knowing our products inside and out in order to answer questions professionally
	Processing orders, forms, applications, and requests.
	Keeping records of customer interactions, transactions, comments, and complaints.
	Communicating and coordinating with colleagues as necessary.
	Providing feedback on the efficiency of the customer service process.
	Managing a team of junior customer service representatives.
	Ensure customer satisfaction and provide professional customer support.


Requirements & Qualifications


	Minimum of HND / B.Sc Degree in Estate Management, Business Administration, or related fields
	2 - 4 years of experience in customer service, estate, or property management
	Strong interpersonal and communication skills
	Ability to handle complaints and resolve issues effectively
	Good organizational and multitasking abilities
	Basic knowledge of facility/estate management practices
	Proficiency in MS Office tools
	Proximity to Ikeja or its environs is an added advantage.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
